leadText: Heavy Metal (Japanese: ヘヴィメタル Heavy Metal) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Doubles the weight of the Pokémon with this Ability. Autotomize is applied before other weight-modifying effects, including Heavy Metal. Heavy Metal is the only effect that can cause a Pokémon's weight to exceed 999.9 kg. This has no effect on the Heavy Ball , which uses the Pokémon's species' weight rather than its current weight. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Heavy Metal has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Doubles the weight of the Pokémon with this Ability. Autotomize is applied before other weight-modifying effects, including Heavy Metal. Heavy Metal is the only effect that can cause a Pokémon's weight to exceed 999.9 kg. This has no effect on the Heavy Ball , which uses the Pokémon's species' weight rather than its current weight.
